title: Monday Vibe - External User Applications
excerpt: Hello! I have been messing around with Monday Vibe and am very impressed with its capabilities. I would like to use it to build an investor portal type application where users could log in, view their investment performa…

posts.author: gtatcpi (Garrick)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I have been messing around with Monday Vibe and am very impressed with its capabilities. I would like to use it to build an investor portal type application where users could log in, view their investment performance & documents, etc. I know Monday is more for internal use, but is this a possible use case? Could I invite external users as guests to access the application? Thanks!!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You could definitely add them as a guest to the board to allow them to see the app you created.

posts.author: gtatcpi (Garrick)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! I haven’t done much work with guests in the past, do guest accounts have their own unique login so I can properly set user permissions or is it more of a view-only setup? I need to provide unique data to each user so this is a concern.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
yes, they’d each have their own login. Do you have Pro or Enterprise? With Enterprise you can customize permissions further.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

image2220×1378 286 KB

posts.author: gtatcpi (Garrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Desiree,

I have a Pro account. I saw that Vibe plans on releasing public-facing sites soon, that will be huge for applications such as mine!
